apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"apps/v1","kind":"StatefulSet","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"mongodb-replica","namespace":"mongodb"},"spec":{"podManagementPolicy":"Parallel","replicas":3,"selector":{"matchLabels":{"app":"mongodb-replica"}},"serviceName":"mongodb-replica-svc","template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"mongodb-replica"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["mongod","--replSet","mongodb-replica","--bind_ip_all","--auth","--keyFile=/etc/mongo-keyfile/keyfile"],"env":[{"name":"POD_NAME","valueFrom":{"fieldRef":{"fieldPath":"metadata.name"}}}],"image":"mongo:6.0.5","livenessProbe":{"exec":{"command":["/usr/local/bin/health-check.sh"]},"failureThreshold":10,"initialDelaySeconds":90,"periodSeconds":10,"timeoutSeconds":5},"name":"mongod","ports":[{"containerPort":27017,"name":"mongodb","protocol":"TCP"}],"readinessProbe":{"exec":{"command":["/usr/local/bin/health-check.sh"]},"failureThreshold":6,"initialDelaySeconds":60,"periodSeconds":10,"timeoutSeconds":5},"resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"1","memory":"1Gi"},"requests":{"cpu":"0.5","memory":"512Mi"}},"volumeMounts":[{"mountPath":"/data/db","name":"data-volume"},{"mountPath":"/etc/mongo-keyfile","name":"mongo-keyfile","readOnly":true},{"mountPath":"/usr/local/bin/health-check.sh","name":"health-script","readOnly":true,"subPath":"health-check.sh"},{"mountPath":"/etc/health","name":"health-secret","readOnly":true},{"mountPath":"/etc/health/overrides","name":"health-overrides","readOnly":true}]}],"securityContext":{"runAsGroup":0,"runAsUser":0},"volumes":[{"name":"mongo-keyfile","secret":{"defaultMode":256,"secretName":"mongo-keyfile"}},{"name":"health-secret","secret":{"items":[{"key":"password","path":"health-password"}],"secretName":"health-user-password"}},{"configMap":{"name":"health-overrides"},"name":"health-overrides"},{"configMap":{"defaultMode":493,"name":"health-check-script"},"name":"health-script"}]}},"volumeClaimTemplates":[{"metadata":{"name":"data-volume"},"spec":{"accessModes":["ReadWriteOnce"],"resources":{"requests":{"storage":"10Gi"}}}}]}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-06-18T12:18:29Z"
  generation: 1
  name: mongodb-replica
  namespace: mongodb
  resourceVersion: "319499"
  uid: 0944d66d-a27f-48f9-9e80-ad23d1fa741a
spec:
  persistentVolumeClaimRetentionPolicy:
    whenDeleted: Retain
    whenScaled: Retain
  podManagementPolicy: Parallel
  replicas: 3
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: mongodb-replica
  serviceName: mongodb-replica-svc
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app: mongodb-replica
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - mongod
        - --replSet
        - mongodb-replica
        - --bind_ip_all
        - --auth
        - --keyFile=/etc/mongo-keyfile/keyfile
        env:
        - name: POD_NAME
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              apiVersion: v1
              fieldPath: metadata.name
        image: mongo:6.0.5
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        livenessProbe:
          exec:
            command:
            - /usr/local/bin/health-check.sh
          failureThreshold: 10
          initialDelaySeconds: 90
          periodSeconds: 10
          successThreshold: 1
          timeoutSeconds: 5
        name: mongod
        ports:
        - containerPort: 27017
          name: mongodb
          protocol: TCP
        readinessProbe:
          exec:
            command:
            - /usr/local/bin/health-check.sh
          failureThreshold: 6
          initialDelaySeconds: 60
          periodSeconds: 10
          successThreshold: 1
          timeoutSeconds: 5
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: "1"
            memory: 1Gi
          requests:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
        volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /data/db
          name: data-volume
        - mountPath: /etc/mongo-keyfile
          name: mongo-keyfile
          readOnly: true
        - mountPath: /usr/local/bin/health-check.sh
          name: health-script
          readOnly: true
          subPath: health-check.sh
        - mountPath: /etc/health
          name: health-secret
          readOnly: true
        - mountPath: /etc/health/overrides
          name: health-overrides
          readOnly: true
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Always
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext:
        runAsGroup: 0
        runAsUser: 0
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      volumes:
      - name: mongo-keyfile
        secret:
          defaultMode: 256
          secretName: mongo-keyfile
      - name: health-secret
        secret:
          defaultMode: 420
          items:
          - key: password
            path: health-password
          secretName: health-user-password
      - configMap:
          defaultMode: 420
          name: health-overrides
        name: health-overrides
      - configMap:
          defaultMode: 493
          name: health-check-script
        name: health-script
  updateStrategy:
    rollingUpdate:
      partition: 0
    type: RollingUpdate
  volumeClaimTemplates:
  - apiVersion: v1
    kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      name: data-volume
    spec:
      accessModes:
      - ReadWriteOnce
      resources:
        requests:
          storage: 10Gi
      volumeMode: Filesystem
    status:
      phase: Pending
status:
  availableReplicas: 3
  collisionCount: 0
  currentReplicas: 3
  currentRevision: mongodb-replica-6b8d9ff597
  observedGeneration: 1
  readyReplicas: 3
  replicas: 3
  updateRevision: mongodb-replica-6b8d9ff597
  updatedReplicas: 3

input.command: echo "===health-check-script==="; kubectl get cm health-check-script -n mongodb -o jsonpath='{.data.health-check\.sh}' 2>&1; echo; echo "===health-overrides==="; kubectl get cm health-overrides -n mongodb -o yaml 2>&1 | sed -n '1,60p'

content.content:
===health-check-script===
#!/bin/sh
set -e
PW_FILE="/etc/health/health-password"
OVERRIDE="/etc/health/overrides/${POD_NAME}"
if [ -f "$OVERRIDE" ]; then
  HEALTH_PW="$(cat "$OVERRIDE")"
else
  HEALTH_PW="$(cat "$PW_FILE")"
fi
mongosh --quiet "mongodb://health-user:${HEALTH_PW}@localhost:27017/admin" --eval 'db.hello().ok' >/dev/null

===health-overrides===
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"v1","data":{"mongodb-replica-1":"legacyHealthPass123"},"kind":"ConfigMap","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"health-overrides","namespace":"mongodb"}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-06-18T12:18:27Z"
  name: health-overrides
  namespace: mongodb
  resourceVersion: "319486"
  uid: 3b63051a-c006-46b8-ace9-446d5dcd43ae

input.command: echo "real health pw:"; kubectl get secret health-user-password -n mongodb -o jsonpath='{.data.password}' | base64 -d; echo; echo "---describe pod1 probes/events---"; kubectl describe pod mongodb-replica-1 -n mongodb 2>&1 | sed -n '/Liveness/,/Events/p'
input.description: Get real health password and pod1 events

content.content:
real health pw:
healthpass123
---describe pod1 probes/events---
    Liveness:   exec [/usr/local/bin/health-check.sh] delay=90s timeout=5s period=10s #success=1 #failure=10
    Readiness:  exec [/usr/local/bin/health-check.sh] delay=60s timeout=5s period=10s #success=1 #failure=6
    Environment:
      POD_NAME:  mongodb-replica-1 (v1:metadata.name)
    Mounts:
      /data/db from data-volume (rw)
      /etc/health from health-secret (ro)
      /etc/health/overrides from health-overrides (ro)
      /etc/mongo-keyfile from mongo-keyfile (ro)
      /usr/local/bin/health-check.sh from health-script (ro,path="health-check.sh")
      /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount from kube-api-access-qfmmm (ro)
Conditions:
  Type                        Status
  PodReadyToStartContainers   True 
  Initialized                 True 
  Ready                       True 
  ContainersReady             True 
  PodScheduled                True 
Volumes:
  data-volume:
    Type:       PersistentVolumeClaim (a reference to a PersistentVolumeClaim in the same namespace)
    ClaimName:  data-volume-mongodb-replica-1
    ReadOnly:   false
  mongo-keyfile:
    Type:        Secret (a volume populated by a Secret)
    SecretName:  mongo-keyfile
    Optional:    false
  health-secret:
    Type:        Secret (a volume populated by a Secret)
    SecretName:  health-user-password
    Optional:    false
  health-overrides:
    Type:      ConfigMap (a volume populated by a ConfigMap)
    Name:      health-overrides
    Optional:  false
  health-script:
    Type:      ConfigMap (a volume populated by a ConfigMap)
    Name:      health-check-script
    Optional:  false
  kube-api-access-qfmmm:
    Type:                    Projected (a volume that contains injected data from multiple sources)
    TokenExpirationSeconds:  3607
    ConfigMapName:           kube-root-ca.crt
    Optional:                false
    DownwardAPI:             true
QoS Class:                   Burstable
Node-Selectors:              <none>
Tolerations:                 node.kubernetes.io/not-ready:NoExecute op=Exists for 300s
                             node.kubernetes.io/unreachable:NoExecute op=Exists for 300s
Events:
  Warning  Unhealthy  2m30s (x7 over 3m30s)  kubelet            spec.containers{mongod}: Liveness probe failed: MongoServerError: Authentication failed.
  Warning  Unhealthy  2m25s (x12 over 4m)    kubelet            spec.containers{mongod}: Readiness probe failed: MongoServerError: Authentication failed.
